title: trollius europaeus var. humilis
intro: Trollius europaeus var. humilis, also known as the dwarf globeflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Trollius europaeus var. humilis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Trollius europaeus var. humilis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
